description: Blue and grey backpack, has a flap across the mouth with a concealed zip pocket, secured by dual click claspsOne haul loop, two ergonomically designed, adjustable and padded shoulder strapsOne main compartment secured by a toggle clasp and tabs with click-clasp, has a mesh zip pocketA mesh stash pocket with an elasticated mouth on either sideAn adjustable waist strap secured by a click claspEco friendly, PVC free and recyclablePadded backDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 5 years against manufacturing defects
